# Getting help with endpulse

This file routes your question to the fastest answer.

## Where to ask

| I want to... | Best place |
|--------------|------------|
| Ask a usage question ("how do I check SSL only?") | [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/kimhinton/endpulse/discussions) |
| Report a bug you can reproduce | [Open an issue](https://github.com/kimhinton/endpulse/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml) |
| Suggest a feature | [Open a feature request](https://github.com/kimhinton/endpulse/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml) |
| Report a security vulnerability | [Private advisory](https://github.com/kimhinton/endpulse/security/advisories/new) — **do not** use public issues |
| Read the full docs | [kimhinton.github.io/endpulse](https://kimhinton.github.io/endpulse/) |
| Contribute code | See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) |

## Before asking

- Run `endpulse --version` and confirm you're on the latest `0.3.x`.
- Check the [README](../README.md) and [changelog](../CHANGELOG.md) for the flag or behavior you're asking about.
- Search [existing issues](https://github.com/kimhinton/endpulse/issues?q=is%3Aissue) and [Discussions](https://github.com/kimhinton/endpulse/discussions) — many common questions are already answered.

## Response expectations

- Discussions: best-effort, typically within a few days.
- Issues: acknowledged within a week; fixes depend on severity.
- Security reports: acknowledged within 72 hours (see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md)).

## Commercial support

endpulse is MIT licensed and maintained in personal time — no commercial support is currently offered. If you need paid support for integration or custom features, open a Discussion so the maintainer can evaluate.
